identity.name: E1
identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

project.name: SoulSathiya
project.target_audience: Indian users seeking serious lifelong partnerships

primary.name: Deep Saffron
primary.usage: Primary Actions, Brand Highlights, Verification Badges

secondary.name: Royal Gold
secondary.usage: Premium Tiers, Success States, Subtle Borders

rules: Ensure contrast ratio > 4.5:1 for body text.
Gradients only for subtle backgrounds, never for text.
Forbidden Color: Teal Blue (#1B93A4) for dashboards.

typography.strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' - Classic Serif Head + Clean Sans Body

headings.usage: Page Titles, Section Headers, Hero Text

rules: Overlines/Labels must be Uppercase + tracking-widest + text-xs.
Line height: Tight (1.1) for headings, Relaxed (1.6) for body.

spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Use 2-3x more whitespace than typical apps.

modes.dashboard: High Density Grid (Tight gaps, full height utilization)

surfaces.borders: Rounded-lg (0.5rem) generally, Rounded-xl (0.75rem) for main cards.

principles: Micro-interactions on all clickable elements (scale 0.98 on tap).

customization: Override default radius to match brand (0.5rem).
Input fields: Remove default heavy ring, use subtle border color change on focus.

images.alt: Joyful Indian couple in traditional attire
Indian woman in red saree smiling
Couple holding hands with engagement ring

icons.usage_guide: Use simple, recognizable icons. Avoid filling them unless active state.

landing_page.hero: Split screen or Center-focus with 'Tracing Beam' highlight.

dashboard.profile: Cover image top, circular avatar overlapping, tabs for details.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Use the file extension .jsx for all React components.
Do not use generic 'Inter' font. Import 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts.
Implement the 'Organic & Earthy' color palette strictly. No 'SaaS Blue'.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
For the Matchmaking Algorithm visuals, use simple clean charts (Recharts) with brand colors.
Profile Photos: Implement the privacy blur effect using CSS backdrop-filter until permission is granted.
Respect the 'Fusion over Imitation' principle. Make it look like a modern Indian lifestyle brand, not a utility tool.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
NEVER use transition: all. Animate specific properties.
NEVER center align the app container (.App { text-align: center }).
Always use modern button styles (pill or sharp) with interaction animations.
